text: Event season's like a freight train, and your booth's got limited visibility. Go big with a custom 10x10 canopy and feather flags that are seen from the parking lot. Spring events demand it. Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com
The summer rush means nonprofit events popping up everywhere. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

When the wind takes out your setup days before a big fall festival, it's crunch time. The real rush isn't just a replacement—it's finding a tent that proves you came prepared. Lead times matter when the lineup's on the line. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

Week before the trade show. Booth neighbor admits they’re on their third tent of the year. Wind is a cruel test. Ours stood strong while theirs turned into a kite. That’s the difference dye sublimation and a solid frame make. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

There's a difference between spending less and getting less. Opting for the "cheapest" often means replacing that flimsy frame mid-season. A sturdy, visible setup pays for itself when every weekend is a market weekend. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com
